agents.name: 分析助手
agents.profile: 轻量分析 / 检索助手：无 Dolphin、无预绑工具；导入后在 Studio 绑定知识网络并挂载 Context Loader 工具箱即可。
agents.config:
{"input":{"fields":[{"name":"query","type":"string","desc":"用户问题"},{"name":"history","type":"object","desc":""},{"name":"header","type":"object","desc":""},{"name":"self_config","type":"object","desc":""},{"name":"tool","type":"object","desc":""}],"rewrite":{"enable":false,"llm_config":{"id":"","name":"REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_LLM_NAME","model_type":"llm","temperature":0.5,"top_p":1,"top_k":1,"frequency_penalty":0,"presence_penalty":0,"max_tokens":4096}},"augment":{"enable":false,"data_source":{"kg":[]}}},"system_prompt":"你是数据分析与知识检索助手。
在 Studio 中为该智能体绑定业务知识网络，并在技能中挂载 **Context Loader 工具箱**（语义检索、对象实例查询、Action 调用等）后，优先使用工具返回的事实作答；无工具结果时不要编造业务数据。
回答力求简洁，必要时用列表或小标题组织结论。
